name: ApiFlash Screenshot API
description: ApiFlash is a powerful screenshot API that allows you to capture screenshots of any website. Supports multiple formats (PNG, JPEG, WebP), full-page captures, custom viewports, and advanced features like geo-location emulation, custom CSS/JS injection, and S3 storage integration.

apis.name: ApiFlash Screenshot API
